protocols.Paper_title: A Novel Bacteriophage Targeting Cronobacter sakazakii Is a Potential Biocontrol Agent in Foods
protocols.Evidence: Bacteriophage isolation and purification included filtration and subsequent centrifugation of samples.

protocols.Paper_title: A Novel Bacteriophage Targeting Cronobacter sakazakii Is a Potential Biocontrol Agent in Foods
protocols.Evidence: The morphology of the purified phage CR5 was observed using transmission electron microscope analysis; the grid was washed.

protocols.Paper_title: A Novel Bacteriophage Targeting Cronobacter sakazakii Is a Potential Biocontrol Agent in Foods
protocols.Evidence: Before isolation of the phage genomic DNA, phage particles were treated with DNase I and RNase A; genomic DNA was then sequenced.

protocols.Paper_title: A Novel Bacteriophage Targeting Cronobacter sakazakii Is a Potential Biocontrol Agent in Foods
protocols.Evidence: Proteomic analysis of phage structural proteins used SDS-PAGE and MALDI-TOF MS; the sample was treated in boiling water.

protocols.Paper_title: A Novel Bacteriophage Targeting Cronobacter sakazakii Is a Potential Biocontrol Agent in Foods
protocols.Evidence: Food application testing used infant formula milk samples, and viable cell numbers of C. sakazakii were monitored.
